name: Lemon Squeezy
description: Lemon Squeezy is a payment platform purpose-built for selling digital products and SaaS. It handles payments, subscriptions, license key generation, tax compliance, and checkout experiences as a merchant of record. The API follows the JSON:API specification and supports both live and test modes.

capabilities.name: list_products
capabilities.description: List all products in your Lemon Squeezy store, with filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: create_checkout
capabilities.description: Create a checkout session for a product variant, returning a URL where the customer can complete their purchase.

capabilities.name: list_orders
capabilities.description: List all orders in your store, with filtering by status, customer, or product.

capabilities.name: list_subscriptions
capabilities.description: List all active and past subscriptions, with filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: get_customer
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details of a specific customer by their ID.

capabilities.name: list_license_keys
capabilities.description: List all license keys generated for your digital products.
